name: Imricor Medical Systems Inc.
analysis: IMR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 19% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$1.8200, stop A$1.5840, target A$2.0200 (0.85:1) — then trail it.
